nasb.text: Now may the Lord show lovingkindness and truth to you; and I also will show this goodness to you, because you have done this thing.

esv.text: Now may the Lord show steadfast love and faithfulness to you. And I will do good to you because you have done this thing.

cnv.text: 你們既作了這事，現在就願耶和華以慈愛和誠實待你們，我也要善待你們。

ccb.text: 愿耶和华以慈爱和信实待你们，我也会厚待你们，因为你们做了这事。
